MS.S: The ActiveDirectoryDsc module contains DSC resources for deployment and configuration of Active Directory._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_ These DSC resources allow you to configure new domains, child domains, and high availability domain controllers, establish cross-domain trusts and manage users, groups and OUs.
Copyright the DSC Community contributors. All rights reserved.

## [6.7.1] - 2025-12-05_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_### Added_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_- ADReadOnlyDomainControllerAccount_x000D__x000A_ - Added read-only value Enabled indicating whether a pre-staged account is Enabled or Disabled (Unoccupied)._x000D__x000A_- `ActiveDirectoryDsc`_x000D__x000A_ - Added strings.psd1 for HQRM compliance._x000D__x000A_- `ADObjectPermissionEntry`_x000D__x000A_ - The "ObjectType" parameter now supports the display name of the object to which_x000D__x000A_ the access rule applies, in addition to the schema GUID._x000D__x000A_ ([issue #744](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ActiveDirectoryDsc/issues/744))._x000D__x000A_ - The "InheritedObjectType" parameter now supports the display name of the object_x000D__x000A_ type that can inherit this access rule, in addition to the schema GUID._x000D__x000A_ ([issue #744](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ActiveDirectoryDsc/issues/744))._x000D__x000A_- ADDomain_x000D__x000A_ - Skip LCM reboot signal if `SuppressReboot` parameter is set to `true`_x000D__x000A_ ([issue #742](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ActiveDirectoryDsc/issues/742))._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_### Removed_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_- All Resources_x000D__x000A_ - Removed about_*.help.txt from sources as these are now generated at build time._x000D__x000A_- `ActiveDirectoryDsc.Common`_x000D__x000A_ - `Test-DscPropertyState` now provided by `DscResource.Common`._x000D__x000A_ - `Compare-ResourcePropertyState` now provided by `DscResource.Common`._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_### Changed_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_- `build.ps1`_x000D__x000A_ - Update to latest Sampler version._x000D__x000A_- `Resolve-Dependency.ps1`_x000D__x000A_ - Update to latest Sampler version._x000D__x000A_- `Resolve-Dependency.psd1`_x000D__x000A_ - Update to latest Sampler version._x000D__x000A_ - Enable ModuleFast._x000D__x000A_- `RequiredModules.psd1`_x000D__x000A_ - Add PlatyPS fixes [#714](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ActiveDirectoryDsc/issues/714)._x000D__x000A_ - Indented.ScriptAnalyzerRules._x000D__x000A_- `analyzersettings.psd1`_x000D__x000A_ - Update to latest dsccommunity version._x000D__x000A_- `ActiveDirectory.psd1`_x000D__x000A_ - Fix formatting._x000D__x000A_ - Clear DscResourcesToExport as this is overwritten by ModuleBuilder._x000D__x000A_ - Add RootModule._x000D__x000A_- `build.yaml`_x000D__x000A_ - Add doc generation._x000D__x000A_ - Move module to buildModule directory._x000D__x000A_ - Add wiki to release assets._x000D__x000A_- `ActiveDirectoryDsc`_x000D__x000A_ - Migrate tests to Pester 5._x000D__x000A_ - Add VSCode settings for Pester Extension._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_### Fixed_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_- ADObjectPermissionEntry_x000D__x000A_ - Fixed Get-TargetResource to return valid ActiveDirectoryRights when ACE is absent._x000D__x000A_- ADDomain_x000D__x000A_ - Report domain exists in `Get-TargetResource` during pending DC promotion reboot._x000D__x000A_ ([issue #742](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ActiveDirectoryDsc/issues/742))._x000D__x000A_- ADDomainController_x000D__x000A_ - Check the operating system to see if it is a domain controller before locating the_x000D__x000A_ domain controller object._x000D__x000A_ Fixes [issue #747](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ActiveDirectoryDsc/issues/747)._x000D__x000A_ - Updated documentation to reflect parameters that should not be used with UseExistingAccount._x000D__x000A_ - Additional guards against null properties when getting DelegatedAdministratorAccountName._x000D__x000A_- ActiveDirectoryDsc.Common_x000D__x000A_ - Removed operating system check from Get-DomainControllerObject and moved into ADDomainController above.
Copyright the DSC Community contributors. All rights reserved.

The ActiveDirectoryDsc module contains DSC resources for deployment and configuration of Active Directory._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_ These DSC resources allow you to configure new domains, child domains, and high availability domain controllers, establish cross-domain trusts and manage users, groups and OUs.

## [6.7.1] - 2025-12-05_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_### Added_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_- ADReadOnlyDomainControllerAccount_x000D__x000A_ - Added read-only value Enabled indicating whether a pre-staged account is Enabled or Disabled (Unoccupied)._x000D__x000A_- `ActiveDirectoryDsc`_x000D__x000A_ - Added strings.psd1 for HQRM compliance._x000D__x000A_- `ADObjectPermissionEntry`_x000D__x000A_ - The "ObjectType" parameter now supports the display name of the object to which_x000D__x000A_ the access rule applies, in addition to the schema GUID._x000D__x000A_ ([issue #744](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ActiveDirectoryDsc/issues/744))._x000D__x000A_ - The "InheritedObjectType" parameter now supports the display name of the object_x000D__x000A_ type that can inherit this access rule, in addition to the schema GUID._x000D__x000A_ ([issue #744](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ActiveDirectoryDsc/issues/744))._x000D__x000A_- ADDomain_x000D__x000A_ - Skip LCM reboot signal if `SuppressReboot` parameter is set to `true`_x000D__x000A_ ([issue #742](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ActiveDirectoryDsc/issues/742))._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_### Removed_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_- All Resources_x000D__x000A_ - Removed about_*.help.txt from sources as these are now generated at build time._x000D__x000A_- `ActiveDirectoryDsc.Common`_x000D__x000A_ - `Test-DscPropertyState` now provided by `DscResource.Common`._x000D__x000A_ - `Compare-ResourcePropertyState` now provided by `DscResource.Common`._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_### Changed_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_- `build.ps1`_x000D__x000A_ - Update to latest Sampler version._x000D__x000A_- `Resolve-Dependency.ps1`_x000D__x000A_ - Update to latest Sampler version._x000D__x000A_- `Resolve-Dependency.psd1`_x000D__x000A_ - Update to latest Sampler version._x000D__x000A_ - Enable ModuleFast._x000D__x000A_- `RequiredModules.psd1`_x000D__x000A_ - Add PlatyPS fixes [#714](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ActiveDirectoryDsc/issues/714)._x000D__x000A_ - Indented.ScriptAnalyzerRules._x000D__x000A_- `analyzersettings.psd1`_x000D__x000A_ - Update to latest dsccommunity version._x000D__x000A_- `ActiveDirectory.psd1`_x000D__x000A_ - Fix formatting._x000D__x000A_ - Clear DscResourcesToExport as this is overwritten by ModuleBuilder._x000D__x000A_ - Add RootModule._x000D__x000A_- `build.yaml`_x000D__x000A_ - Add doc generation._x000D__x000A_ - Move module to buildModule directory._x000D__x000A_ - Add wiki to release assets._x000D__x000A_- `ActiveDirectoryDsc`_x000D__x000A_ - Migrate tests to Pester 5._x000D__x000A_ - Add VSCode settings for Pester Extension._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_### Fixed_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_- ADObjectPermissionEntry_x000D__x000A_ - Fixed Get-TargetResource to return valid ActiveDirectoryRights when ACE is absent._x000D__x000A_- ADDomain_x000D__x000A_ - Report domain exists in `Get-TargetResource` during pending DC promotion reboot._x000D__x000A_ ([issue #742](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ActiveDirectoryDsc/issues/742))._x000D__x000A_- ADDomainController_x000D__x000A_ - Check the operating system to see if it is a domain controller before locating the_x000D__x000A_ domain controller object._x000D__x000A_ Fixes [issue #747](https://github.com/dsccommunity/ActiveDirectoryDsc/issues/747)._x000D__x000A_ - Updated documentation to reflect parameters that should not be used with UseExistingAccount._x000D__x000A_ - Additional guards against null properties when getting DelegatedAdministratorAccountName._x000D__x000A_- ActiveDirectoryDsc.Common_x000D__x000A_ - Removed operating system check from Get-DomainControllerObject and moved into ADDomainController above.

DesiredStateConfiguration DSC DSCResourceKit DSCResource PSModule PSFunction_Find-DomainController PSCommand_Find-DomainController PSIncludes_Function PSDscResource_ADComputer PSDscResource_ADDomain PSDscResource_ADDomainController PSDscResource_ADDomainControllerProperties PSDscResource_ADDomainDefaultPasswordPolicy PSDscResource_ADDomainFunctionalLevel PSDscResource_ADDomainTrust PSDscResource_ADFineGrainedPasswordPolicy PSDscResource_ADForestFunctionalLevel PSDscResource_ADForestProperties PSDscResource_ADGroup PSDscResource_ADKDSKey PSDscResource_ADManagedServiceAccount PSDscResource_ADObjectEnabledState PSDscResource_ADObjectPermissionEntry PSDscResource_ADOptionalFeature PSDscResource_ADOrganizationalUnit PSDscResource_ADReadOnlyDomainControllerAccount PSDscResource_ADReplicationSite PSDscResource_ADReplicationSiteLink PSDscResource_ADReplicationSubnet PSDscResource_ADServicePrincipalName PSDscResource_ADUser PSDscResource_WaitForADDomain PSIncludes_DscResource
